channel.title: GitHub OCaml Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of OCaml in GitHub

item.title: facebook/flow
item.description: Adds static typing to JavaScript to improve developer productivity and code quality.

item.title: coq/coq
item.description: Coq is a formal proof management system. It provides a formal language to write mathematical definitions, executable algorithms and theorems together with an environment for semi-interactive development of machine-checked proofs.

item.title: Camilotk/ocaml4noobs
item.description: O único manual possível de OCaml

item.title: returntocorp/ocaml-tree-sitter-core
item.description: OCaml code generator and runtime library for handling typed tree-sitter CSTs

item.title: ocaml/ocaml
item.description: The core OCaml system: compilers, runtime system, base libraries

item.title: returntocorp/pfff
item.description: pfff is mainly an OCaml API to write static analysis, dynamic analysis, code visualizations, code navigations, or style-preserving source-to-source transformations such as refactorings on source code.

item.title: comby-tools/comby
item.description: A tool for structural code search and replace that supports ~every language.

item.title: BinaryAnalysisPlatform/bap
item.description: Binary Analysis Platform

item.title: rescript-lang/rescript-compiler
item.description: The compiler for ReScript.

item.title: facebook/pyre-check
item.description: Performant type-checking for python.

item.title: ocaml/dune
item.description: A composable build system for OCaml.

item.title: bcpierce00/unison
item.description: Unison file synchronizer

item.title: alavrik/piqi
item.description: Piqi – universal schema language: JSON, XML, Protocol Buffers data validation and conversion

item.title: facebook/infer
item.description: A static analyzer for Java, C, C++, and Objective-C

item.title: aantron/dream
item.description: Tidy, feature-complete Web framework

item.title: ocaml/merlin
item.description: Context sensitive completion for OCaml in Vim and Emacs

item.title: ocaml-multicore/ocaml-multicore
item.description: Multicore OCaml

item.title: ocaml/opam
item.description: opam is a source-based package manager. It supports multiple simultaneous compiler installations, flexible package constraints, and a Git-friendly development workflow.

item.title: mirage/irmin
item.description: Irmin is a distributed database that follows the same design principles as Git

item.title: dfinity/motoko
item.description: Simple high-level language for writing Internet Computer canisters

item.title: shonfeder/um-abt
item.description: An OCaml library implementing abstract binding trees (ABTs)
